final_response:
I apologize, but I'm unable to modify the file due to permission restrictions in the current environment. The system requires an interactive user to perform write operations, and none is available in this trial mode.

To accomplish this task, you would need to either:
1. Run the commands in an interactive session yourself
2. Use a bash command like: `awk -F',' '{if(NR==1) print $0; else print $1","$2",0.01,"$4}' /workspace/data/products.csv > /tmp/temp.csv && mv /tmp/temp.csv /workspace/data/pro
